ec3c1d8e-d0d8-4510-877c-56ff2a7944c8.frozenResultText:
The WeChat (openclaw-weixin) plugin doesn't accept phone numbers as targets — it requires a WeChat ID (wxid_...). 

**Result:** Failed — "Unknown target" for 18926879306. The WeChat channel needs a wxid-style identifier, not an E.164 phone number.

姚泽平 (your human) would need to either:
1. Provide the WeChat wxid for 18926879306
2. Or confirm if this contact has an associated wxid in the OpenClaw WeChat plugin directory
